goal: 给 Catty v0 daily report 增加 context boundary 分解

summary.title: 增加日报边界分解
summary.what: 给 Catty v0 daily report 增加 contextBoundaries 只读派生字段，按 surface-change、time-gap、latest-event、unknown 分解 predictions、judgedSamples 和 lowScoreMisses；dogfood-health summary 透传同一口径，并更新 src/catty/README.md 说明该字段用于审计真实切换样本质量。
summary.why: 当前 live dogfood 仍 blocked 在缺少 user-prior candidate，但历史低分 miss 可能来自旧记录或同 surface 长间隔。把 boundary 分布放进 report/health，可以让后续 agent 区分真实上下文切换样本、time-gap 样本和旧 unknown 样本，减少把 prediction eval 数据误读成 user-prior 证据的风险。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 daily report 增加 context boundary 分解

decisions.chose: 放在 DailyReport.contextBoundaries，并由 dogfood-health summary 透传。
decisions.rationale: report 是 v0 反漂移审计面；dogfood-health 是长期操作入口，透传同一口径能避免另建指标定义。

decisions.point: 旧 prediction 记录如何处理
decisions.chose: 没有 boundaryKind 的旧记录计入 unknown。
decisions.rationale: boundaryKind 是此前新增的可选 JSON 字段，旧记录不迁移也能被审计出来。

decisions.point: 是否改变采样或写入协议
decisions.chose: 只做只读派生统计，不改变 shadow sampling、judge、memory admission、canary、accepted-memory、heartbeat 或模型调用边界。
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是提升 dogfood 诊断能力，不是推进转正或调度。

decisions.chose: 将 int_883ab229、int_39b41008、int_197bb747、int_6ba06425 视为同一 catty 分支上的顺序诊断增强。
decisions.rationale: 本轮在 sourceQuality、samplingFreshness 和 boundaryKind 既有输出上补 report 级聚合，不反向修改这些协议。

rejected.reason: samplingFreshness 只解释当前 live context；daily report 需要解释当天 prediction / judgement / low-score miss 的整体样本来源。

rejected.alternative: 给旧 prediction JSON 回填 boundaryKind
rejected.reason: 这会引入迁移/写库边界；unknown 统计已经足够表达旧样本不可判定。

review_notes: TDD：先运行 bun test src/catty/report.test.ts，红测失败于 result.report.contextBoundaries 为 undefined；实现后 focused 测试通过。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/report.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，11 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，78 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
live smoke：bun src/catty/report.ts --date $(date +%F) 输出 contextBoundaries；今天旧 Catty prediction 均为 unknown，lowScoreMisses unknown=2。
live smoke：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date $(date +%F) --max 10 仍 blocked，但 summary.contextBoundaries 已透传；samplingFreshness 当前仍是 repeated-context/time-gap。
runtime live status：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat ok，observe ok，full pipeline throttled 正常。
工作区仍有既有无关 unstaged CLAUDE.md，未 stage、未提交、未修改。

subsystems: Catty v0 daily report anti-drift audit
architectural_claims: DailyReport now exposes contextBoundaries as a read-only derived audit field over existing PredictionContext.boundaryKind JSON.
Dogfood-health reuses report.contextBoundaries instead of recomputing boundary metrics independently.
Unknown boundary counts are the compatibility path for older persisted prediction contexts without boundaryKind.
The change does not alter prediction sampling, judgement writeback, memory candidate generation, canary planning, accepted-memory writing, heartbeat, or model-call behavior.
behavioral_changes: generateDailyReport now returns contextBoundaries.predictions, contextBoundaries.judgedSamples, and contextBoundaries.lowScoreMisses.
Boundary counts split records into surfaceChange, timeGap, latestEvent, and unknown buckets.
inspectCattyDogfoodHealth now includes summary.contextBoundaries from the daily report.
src/catty/README.md documents the new report and health field and its anti-misread purpose.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/report.ts output JSON includes report.contextBoundaries
bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts output JSON includes summary.contextBoundaries

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json were read or emitted.
No model provider calls were added.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, catty_memory_canaries, prediction records, or heartbeat configuration are written by this reporting change.
migration_notes: No SQLite migration required; the field is computed from existing context_json values.
Existing prediction records without boundaryKind are counted as unknown.
